title: Horizon Europe topics anchor Copernicus use across mobility sectors
summary: The Horizon Europe Work Programme continues to embed Copernicus and EGNSS across mobility-related topics.
body: Beyond the topics EUSPA manages directly, the Horizon Europe Work Programme widely recommends or requires Copernicus and EGNSS use across non-space topics spanning mobility, climate resilience and big data. This sustains a strong pipeline of downstream applications in road, automotive and adjacent sectors.
